payload.answer:
These two memories appear to say the same thing: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans. The difference is only wording/punctuation, so this is best treated as a duplicate.

Safe actions:
- link_duplicate: connect the new item to the existing memory
- keep_existing: retain the current memory and do not add a separate duplicate
- add_anyway: store both as separate memories if you want redundancy
- edit: adjust the new wording before saving
- cancel: take no action
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans"
New memory: "Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans"
